$comment: FC16 D-CSUBSET-ANON-MEMBER-PROMOTION (C11/C23 §6.7.2.1 ¶13): an anonymous STRUCT member's fields (a, b) are promoted into the enclosing struct's member namespace with SEQUENTIAL offsets (a @ 0, b @ 4 — NOT aliased). s.a=40 + s.b=2 -> 42. Without promotion s.a/s.b are undeclared (S0017); if aliased union-style the sum would be 4. Runs on all four targets + the shipped release pipeline.
